prompt: Run ./.venv/bin/pytest in this project with PYTHONPATH=. set so the retrieval_research package is importable. Use the shell tool with: 'PYTHONPATH=. ./.venv/bin/pytest -x --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -80'. Report the final pass/fail/error count and the first failure (if any). Do not modify any code.
summary: Use a read-then-write plan for: Run ./.venv/bin/pytest in this project with PYTHONPATH=. set so the retrieval_research package is importable. Use the shell tool with: 'PYTHONPATH=. ./.venv/bin/pytest -x --tb=shor. Prefer narrow file inspection, minimal churn, and explicit verification.

steps.title: Survey the workspace
steps.objective: Identify the repo areas and files most relevant to the task.

steps.title: Inspect the critical implementation details
steps.objective: Read the narrowest set of files needed to confirm the current behavior.

steps.title: Apply the smallest coherent code change
steps.objective: Implement the feature or fix with minimal unrelated churn.

steps.title: Verify the result
steps.objective: Check the final state, run the relevant validation, and confirm completion honestly.
